ham.subject: Order Confirmation - Flipkart Order #123456789
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! We’re excited to let you know that your order has been successfully placed.

Order Details:
Order ID: 123456789
Items:
1. Wireless Earbuds – ₹799
2. Portable Power Bank – ₹1,200
Total: ₹2,000

Shipping Address:
123, Green Street, Phase 2, Gurgaon, Haryana 122003

Estimated Delivery:
2 – 3 working days from the date of purchase.

If you have any questions or need to track your shipment, simply click on the link below:
<URL>

Thank you for choosing Flipkart. We hope you enjoy your purchase!

Best Regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: HR Payroll Update Required
spam.body:
Dear John,

This is the HR Department. A recent audit has flagged your payroll account. Please verify your payroll details within the next 24 hours to avoid any delay in salary disbursement.

You must click the link below and provide the required information:
<URL>

If you do not comply, your salary for the upcoming month will be withheld until the issue is resolved. This is a mandatory compliance procedure.

Regards,
HR Manager
HR Department
